name: Jade Chen
tagline: I specialize in statistical analysis, predictive modeling, and data visualization using Python, R, and SQL.
aboutpara:
I am a data scientist with a background in behavioural neuroscience. I specialize in statistical analysis, predictive modeling, and data visualization using Python, R, and SQL.

Outside of data, I enjoy rock climbing and have spent several summers climbing across Canada, the US, France, and Spain. However, my recent obsession is beach volleyball!

Fun fact: I worked as a pastry chef for over five years.

resume.description: Masters of Data Science student at the University of British Columbia

roles.title: Research Assistant
roles.bullets: Conducting research on human–nature interaction, Deploying Raspberry Pi sensors, Training computer vision models

roles.title: Project Assistant
roles.bullets: Conducting research on health equity and access to nature, Performing quantitative and qualitative data analysis

roles.title: Academic Assistant
roles.bullets: Developing the Diverse Data Hub website, Setting up automated build and deployment workflows, Supporting R and Python packages

roles.title: Co-founder and Research Lead
roles.bullets: Led secondary child psychology research on social and emotional learning (SEL), Translated scientific literature into accessible educational content
